title: Anno and Asukas voice actor
wikitext:
[]: Anno and Asuka's voice actor             Quote Post by Prons » Mon Jun 20, 2005 7:52 pm Long ago, and by long ago, I mean long ago, I heard a rumor that Anno proposed to Asuka's voice actor sometime during the show, and got shot down. Did that really happen, or was it just a rumor? I wasn't sure wether ot put this in discussion or chit chat.

Did that really happen, or was it just a rumor? I wasn't sure wether ot put this in discussion or chit chat.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jun 20, 2005 9:56 pm I've heard before that he dated Asukas VA but the asked her to marry her thig is new to me. CAn we get any kind of proof of this?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 21, 2005 1:34 am The best information we have is here http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=16516#16516
